title: Notify board creator when deletion occurs, more detailed permissions options

posts.author: mikaylaonechronos (Mikayla Betancourt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Notify board creator when deletion occurs, more detailed permissions options

Deletion Notification

When another member of the team deletes anything, the board’s creator should be notified. Would help in cases that Monday boards are used for compliance related tasks.

Deletion Permissions

Alternatively, more options for permissions settings would be helpful. For other members of the team, the board creator can say that they don’t have permission to delete but maintain editing privileges.

Column Based Editing Permissions

The ability to determine more specifically what certain people are allowed to edit. So they can edit some columns, but not certain others. Helpful for accountability and to ensure the integrity of the board without sacrificing functionality.

Activity Log Notifications

Another way to achieve these ends would be to introduce notifications in the activity log, so that if certain edits occur the board creator can be notified of what changed and who did it. Helpful for accountability and ensuring the integrity of the board’s data.

posts.author: FredHeilbronner (Fred Heilbronner)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to notify a person from the item - a person who is assigned to the task for example.
